pattern: (?:ModuleNotFoundError: No module named '[VAR]')|(?:ValueError: Please install the '[VAR]' package)
description: Required python package is missing in the execution environment.
resolution_step: Add the missing package to your requirements.txt or rebuild the Docker image.
representative_examples: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pandas'
ValueError: Please install the 'db-dtypes' package to use this function

description: User does not have sufficient permissions to access the resource (BigQuery, Drive, etc.).
resolution_step: Check the IAM roles for the service account and ensure it has access to both BigQuery and the underlying source (e.g., Google Drive).
representative_examples: google.api_core.exceptions.Forbidden: 403 Access Denied: BigQuery: Permission denied while getting Drive credentials.

pattern: BadRequest: 400 Provided schema does not match|Invalid schema update
description: The query result schema does not match the destination table schema.
resolution_step: Align the column names and types between the query and the target table.
representative_examples: BadRequest: 400 Provided schema does not match. Field 'amount' has changed type from INT64 to FLOAT64

description: Failed to automatically infer BigQuery schema from DataFrame.
resolution_step: Explicitly define the schema instead of relying on automatic inference.
representative_examples: pyarrow.lib.ArrowTypeError: Could not convert FLOAT64 to INT64

description: Data delivery operation exceeded the time limit.
resolution_step: Check network latency or increase the timeout setting in the operator.
representative_examples: AirflowSensorTimeout: Timeout reached
DELIVERY_TIMEOUT: Execution time has exceeded the time limit

pattern: NotFound: 404 Not found: Table|FileNotFoundError: \[Errno 2\] No such file or directory
description: The specified source file or destination table does not exist.
resolution_step: Verify the path or table name and ensure it was created in previous steps.
representative_examples: NotFound: 404 Not found: Table project.dataset.table
FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/tmp/data.csv'

description: The process was terminated because it exceeded the available memory.
resolution_step: Increase the memory limit of the container or optimize the code to handle data in smaller chunks.
representative_examples: MemoryError: Unable to allocate 2.4 GiB for an array with shape
Container terminated with exit code 137 (OOMKilled)

pattern: Quota exceeded: Your project exceeded quota|429 Too Many Requests
description: API call frequency or data volume exceeded the cloud provider's quota.
resolution_step: Implement exponential backoff or request a quota increase from the cloud provider console.
representative_examples: google.api_core.exceptions.Forbidden: 403 Quota exceeded: Your project exceeded quota for free query bytes per day

pattern: Connection refused|Failed to establish a new connection|OperationalError: \(psycopg2\)
description: Could not connect to the database server. Server might be down or blocked by firewall.
resolution_step: Check if the DB server is running and verify firewall/security group rules for the worker IP.
representative_examples: psycopg2.OperationalError: could not connect to server: Connection refused

description: The local disk or temporary directory is full.
resolution_step: Clean up the /tmp directory or increase the disk size of the worker/PVC.
representative_examples: OSError: [Errno 28] No space left on device: '/var/lib/airflow/tmp'

description: The generated SQL query contains syntax errors.
resolution_step: Check the SQL string for missing commas, incorrect keywords, or unclosed quotes.
representative_examples: google.api_core.exceptions.BadRequest: 400 Syntax error: Unexpected keyword SELECT at [5:1]

description: SSL handshake failed while connecting to an external API/DB.
resolution_step: Update the CA certificates in the environment or check if the target's certificate is expired.
representative_examples: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self signed certificate

description: A Spark executor was terminated, often due to OOM or spot instance preemption.
resolution_step: Check executor memory settings or increase the number of retries for Spark tasks.
representative_examples: org.apache.spark.SparkException: Job aborted due to stage failure: ExecutorLostFailure (executor 5 exited caused by external signal)

pattern: Cannot insert the value NULL|Column [VAR] cannot be null
description: Attempted to insert NULL into a column that has a NOT NULL constraint.
resolution_step: Inspect the source data for unexpected NULL values or update the target table schema.
representative_examples: sqlalchemy.exc.IntegrityError: (psycopg2.errors.NotNullViolation) column 'user_id' contains null values

description: The authentication token or credentials used for the service have expired.
resolution_step: Refresh the service account token or update the connection credentials in Airflow.
representative_examples: google.auth.exceptions.RefreshError: The credentials have expired and could not be refreshed

description: The Kubernetes pod running the task was preempted by a higher priority pod or node maintenance.
resolution_step: The task should be retried automatically. If it happens frequently, check pod priority settings.
representative_examples: AirflowException: Kubernetes pod was deleted before it could complete

pattern: Deadlock found when trying to get lock|Transaction rollback
description: A database transaction was rolled back because it was deadlocked with another process.
resolution_step: Reduce parallelism for this task or check for long-running transactions locking the same tables.
representative_examples: MySQLdb.OperationalError: (1213, 'Deadlock found when trying to get lock; try restarting transaction')

description: A required environment variable for the DAG/Task is missing.
resolution_step: Define the missing environment variable in the Airflow deployment or Dockerfile.
representative_examples: KeyError: 'DB_PASSWORD' during os.environ retrieval

pattern: Malformed records|not a valid Parquet file|Error parsing line
description: The source data file is corrupted or does not follow the expected format.
resolution_step: Verify the source file integrity and check for unexpected delimiters or header changes.
representative_examples: pandas.errors.ParserError: Error tokenizing data. C error: Expected 5 fields in line 10, saw 7

description: Conflict during file upload/download in Google Cloud Storage due to version mismatch.
resolution_step: Check if multiple processes are trying to write to the same GCS object simultaneously.
representative_examples: google.api_core.exceptions.PreconditionFailed: 412 Precondition Failed (Generation match failed)
